## 📝 Description
Syncing latest typo fixes and minor documentation updates from the `main` branch to maintain codebase health.

## 🛠️ Type of Change
- [ ] ✨ New Feature
- [ ] 🐛 Bug Fix
- [ ] 🧹 Chore / Maintenance (Typos, Refactoring)
- [ ] 📚 Documentation Update

## 🧪 How Has This Been Tested?
- [ ] Docker container build success (`docker compose up --build`)
- [ ] Manual verification of file contents

## ✅ Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project.
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code.
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas.
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings in the Docker logs.
- [ ] I have updated the `.env.example` if any new variables were added.
